Property overview

Classic ranch comfort with modern updates.

The residence

Built to last. Updated to enjoy.

This traditional ranch has stood the test of time and has now been refreshed for the next chapter.

The home includes approximately 2,700 square feet plus bonus finished lower-level space. The main level features a fully remodeled kitchen, new appliances, main-floor laundry, fresh finishes, and an easy everyday layout.

The lower level adds flexibility with finished living area, an office, and an adjoining private bath.

  • 1974 construction
  • Approx. 2,700 sq ft
  • 1 acre
  • Finished lower level
  • Main-floor laundry
  • Private well irrigation
  • New HVAC system
  • Home warranty included

1 Woodland Drive

Augusta, KS 67010
